a: What's your go-to takeaway order?
b: What's the first thing you'd eat after a long flight?

a: What food do you always go back for seconds of?
b: What food do you make sure to eat at every party?

a: What's the one food you could never give up?
b: What food would you request for your birthday dinner?

a: What do you always end up ordering even when you say you won't?
b: What's the food you eat when nobody's watching?

a: What do you always snack on during a movie?
b: What do you eat when you're bored at home?

a: What's the first drink you get at a party?
b: What do you always order at a bar when you can't decide?

a: What do you drink when you're stressed?
b: What do you always reach for after a hard day?

a: Where would you go if someone handed you a plane ticket right now?
b: Where would you go if you had two weeks off tomorrow?

a: What country do you think about visiting the most?
b: What destination do you keep saving for later?

a: Where would you move if you had to leave your country?
b: Where would you retire if money wasn't an issue?

a: What city do you wish you lived in?
b: What city do you always want to go back to?

a: Who would you want to be stuck in an airport with?
b: Who would you want as your travel buddy for a month?

a: Who would you call if you needed advice and could call anyone?
b: Who would you want as a mentor if you could pick anyone alive?

a: Who would you cast to play you in a movie about your life?
b: Which actor do you think looks or acts the most like you?

a: Who would you invite to a dinner party if you could pick anyone?
b: Who would you want sitting next to you at a fancy event?

a: Who do you think is the most interesting person alive right now?
b: Who would you most want to interview if you had one hour?

a: What's the movie you've rewatched the most?
b: What movie could you put on right now and be happy?

a: What show do you always recommend to people?
b: What show do you think everyone eventually watches?

a: What movie do you quote most in real life?
b: What movie do you still think about years later?

a: What show did you finish in one sitting?
b: What show made you cancel plans to keep watching?

a: What song do you always skip to first on a playlist?
b: What song do you always turn up when it comes on?

a: What artist do you always go back to no matter what?
b: Who do you always end up listening to on a long drive?

a: What song would you pick for your entrance at a party?
b: What song would you walk into a room to if you had to pick one?

a: What job would you do if you knew you couldn't fail?
b: What career would you pick if you had to start completely fresh?

a: What job do you think you'd secretly be great at?
b: What job do you think would suit you that nobody would expect?

a: What did you want to be when you grew up?
b: What career did you seriously consider before the one you have?

a: What animal do you think matches your personality?
b: What animal do you think your friends would say you are?

a: What animal would you be for a day if you could pick?
b: What animal do you think has the best life?

a: What superpower would you pick if you could only have one?
b: What ability would you choose if you could add one thing to your life?

a: What would you pick — flying, invisibility, or reading minds?
b: If you had to choose one power from a movie, what would it be?

a: What sport do you think you'd be good at if you trained seriously?
b: What sport do you think suits your personality?

a: What hobby do you always say you'll try but never do?
b: What activity would you get obsessed with if you started?

a: What historical figure would you most want to have dinner with?
b: What historical figure would be the most fun to spend a day with?

a: What decade in history would you most want to live in?
b: What era would you visit if you had a time machine for one trip?

a: How many hours of sleep do you actually need to feel human?
b: How many hours do you usually end up sleeping on a weekend?

a: How many close friends do you think a person actually needs?
b: How many people would you invite to your ideal dinner party?

a: What age do you think was the best of your life so far?
b: What age do you think you were most yourself?

a: What invention could you not live without?
b: What piece of technology would you refuse to give up?

a: What object in your home would you save first in a fire?
b: What's the one thing you'd grab if you had to leave the house fast?

a: What's your most irrational fear?
b: What's something small that freaks you out way more than it should?

a: Where do you go to clear your head?
b: Where do you go when you need to recharge?

a: What kind of setting makes you feel most at peace?
b: What environment do you feel most like yourself in?

a: If you had to learn a language overnight, which would you pick?
b: What language do you wish you could already speak?

a: What colour do you think best represents your personality?
b: If someone described you as a colour, what do you think they'd say?

a: What subject at school do you wish you'd taken more seriously?
b: What subject do you think actually prepared you best for real life?

a: What skill do you wish you'd learned as a kid?
b: What ability do you wish your parents had taught you growing up?

a: What decade had the best music?
b: What decade do you think you'd have had the most fun in?

a: What decade had the best fashion?
b: What era's style do you think you could actually pull off?

a: What weather do you feel most productive in?
b: What weather puts you in the best mood?

a: What fictional character do you relate to most?
b: What fictional character do you think is most like you?

a: What fictional character would you want as your best friend?
b: What fictional character would you want in your corner during a crisis?

a: What brand do you always go back to even if there are cheaper options?
b: What brand do you feel weirdly loyal to?

a: What's your default fast food order?
b: What meal do you get when you're in a rush and hungry?

a: What dessert do you never get tired of?
b: What sweet treat do you always make room for?

a: What drink do you always have in your fridge?
b: What beverage do you restock without thinking?

a: What place feels like your second home?
b: Where do you spend time when you don't want to be at home?

a: What place would you show someone visiting your area?
b: Where do you take people when you want to impress them locally?

a: Who do you text the most?
b: Who do you talk to almost every day?

a: Who knows you better than anyone?
b: Who would describe you most accurately?

a: What game have you played the most hours of?
b: What game do you always come back to over time?

a: What app do you waste the most time on?
b: What app do you open without thinking?

a: What habit are you trying to break?
b: What habit do you wish you didn't have?

a: What habit are you trying to build?
b: What routine do you wish you stuck to more?

a: What time of day are you most productive?
b: When do you feel like you get the most done?

a: What kind of music do you listen to when you're alone?
b: What music do you put on when nobody else is around?

a: What kind of music do you play around other people?
b: What music do you feel safe putting on with friends?

a: What skill would you flex if you had to impress people?
b: What talent would you show off if you had one chance?

a: What would you do with a completely free day?
b: How would you spend a day with zero responsibilities?

a: What purchase have you never regretted?
b: What is the best thing you've ever spent money on?

a: What purchase do you regret the most?
b: What is something you wish you never bought?

a: What kind of videos do you fall into watching for hours?
b: What content do you lose track of time watching?

a: What’s something you're surprisingly competitive about?
b: What do you hate losing at more than you should?
